3000150.name: Chrome Jumper
3000150.description:
Chrome Jumper is an hard Parkour game in an stunning chrome style.
Master all the different obstacles and make it to the top. but watch out, if you fail and drop down u can try to land on one of the lower platforms but if you are unlucky you have start from the ground again.



Upload your best run as a youtube video and the steam name of the best players gets featured here.


100x Steam Achievments (just start the game)

Good Luck all!
3000150.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
